final:
module ram_512x32_sp
(
    input clk,
    input we,
    input [8:0] addr,
    input [31:0] wdata,
    output reg [31:0] rdata
);

reg [31:0] ram [511:0];

always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (we) begin ram[addr] <= wdata ; end
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  rdata <= ram[addr] ;
  end

endmodule
